prompt: My 4-month-old daughter weighs 2.5 kg and has MUAC 10.2 cm. The clinic gave her MNS sachets. A neighbor said to also give her goat milk. Should I?
My child has been on treatment for 8 visits and has not fully recovered. I want to stop coming. What should I do?
My 6-month-old boy was treated and discharged as recovered. Now two months later he seems thin again. What is happening?
My 24-month-old daughter had MUAC 12.4 and was enrolled in the program. A traditional healer said I should give her herbal tea instead of the sachets. Is that okay?
My child recovered and was discharged. I was not told to come back. Now she seems thinner. Should I go to the clinic even without a scheduled visit?
I heard from other mothers that the sachets are bad for children because they are made of foreign ingredients. My child refuses them. What should I do?

My 9-month-old son weighs 5 kg and MUAC is 10.2 cm. He has had 6 follow-ups but shows little progress. The clinic gave him 28-day sachets. I am giving him the sachets but also feeding him less food to save money. Is that okay?
My 12-month-old son has MUAC 11.4 cm and weighs 4 kg. He is on-going treatment. He has a fever this week. Should I still give him the sachet?
My child's MUAC went from 12.3 to 12.4 after 4 visits. The clinic says she is almost recovered. But she still looks thin to me. Should I be concerned?
My 16-month-old daughter has MUAC 12.3 cm and was enrolled as a new patient. She has no follow-ups yet. I cannot afford the bus fare to come again. What should I do?
My 7-month-old girl with MUAC 10.5 cm is on a 7-visit program. She seems to be gaining weight but the doctor has not discharged her. Why is she still on the program?
I was told my child has SAM. I looked online and it said it can be fatal. I am very scared. Is my child going to die?
My neighbor's child recovered in 3 visits. My child has had 6 visits and is still on-going. Am I doing something wrong?
My 5-month-old son has MUAC 10.2 cm and weighs 3.2 kg. He is on MNP. My mother-in-law says I should stop breastfeeding and switch to cow milk. Should I?
My child was discharged as recovered after 4 visits at MUAC 12.4. My family says the clinic made a mistake because she still looks thin. Who should I believe?
My 8-month-old daughter weighs 4 kg and MUAC is 11.1 cm. She has been on-going for 7 visits. I am thinking of trying a different doctor. Should I?
My 6-month-old female weighs 3.6 kg and MUAC is 10.0 cm. She has had 3 follow-ups and is on MNS. She cries a lot during feeding. Is that normal with this sachet?
My 24-month-old daughter had a relapse after recovering from MAM. She now has MUAC 12.4 cm again and weight of 8 kg. What happened and what do I do now?
My 18-month-old son was not vaccinated and has MUAC 11.9 cm. Is the lack of vaccine related to his low MUAC?
My child completed 8 follow-up visits at the Sujawal clinic and is still not fully recovered. What are my options?
I have been giving my 7-month-old son rice water because he had diarrhea and I thought it would help him gain weight. Is that okay?
My aunt says I should stop giving my daughter the malnutrition sachet because it is making her too dependent on it. Is that true?
A healer in our village gave my malnourished son herbal roots to eat. He seems better. Should I continue giving them?
My 6-month-old has low weight. Someone told me stopping breastfeeding and starting solid foods early will help her gain weight faster. Is that true?
I heard that thin children just have a weak body constitution and no treatment will help. Is that true?
My child is malnourished. My neighbor said mixing ghee into the therapeutic food sachet makes it more effective. Should I do that?
I have been giving my 9-month-old daughter diluted cow milk instead of breastmilk because I do not produce enough milk. Is this safe?
My 12-month-old was enrolled in the malnutrition program. My family says she just needs more prayers and will recover. Should I still take her to the clinic?
My mother says giving my child pakka namak (rock salt) water helps with weakness. She is 9 months old. Is this safe?
I stopped giving my child the sachets for one week because I thought she was doing better. Now she seems worse. What should I do?
My child only eats roti and chai. My family says this is enough for a growing child. But the clinic says she is malnourished. Who is right?
I was told by a neighbor that giving my malnourished child less food makes the stomach adjust and she will stop being malnourished. Is that true?
My 5-month-old daughter has low weight. My family says I should give her soft bread soaked in tea. Is that okay?
My son was enrolled in the Sujawal clinic program. A man in the bazaar sold me herbal powder he said cures malnutrition. Should I give it to my child?
My 24-month-old daughter relapsed. My mother-in-law says it is because I vaccinated her and it weakened her. Is the vaccine responsible for her relapse?
My child is on a treatment program. I also give him a traditional Sindhi remedy called joshanda every night. Is that safe?
I stopped bringing my child to the clinic after 1 visit because the doctor did not explain anything to me. Should I go back?
My child is thin but very active and playful. My family says if she is active she cannot be malnourished. Is that true?
My family says the clinic is far and the journey tires my child more than helps her. Is it really worth the trip?
My child is sick. What should I do?
How much should I feed?
Is this normal?
My baby is not eating. What medicine should I give?
The clinic gave my child something. Is it safe?
My child is getting worse. What should I do?
Should I continue the treatment?

Is my daughter okay?
How do I help my child gain weight?
The sachet my child takes — how long does it last?
My child has swelling. Is that from malnutrition?

My child has had puffy swollen feet for three days. What food will fix this?
My 4-month-old girl weighs 2.5 kg. She cries all the time and does not sleep. What should I give her to make her stronger?
My child has not gained any weight in 3 months despite taking the sachets. What more can I do at home?
My 6-month-old boy had MUAC 11.9 and recovered. Now at 8 months his arms look thinner. I am scared to go back to the clinic. Can I manage at home?
My child has had diarrhea for 5 days along with low weight. What food helps?
My 12-month-old daughter weighs 3.5 kg and MUAC is 10.0 cm. She has had 5 visits. Can I give her more sachets at home without coming to the clinic?
My child stopped responding when I call her name. She has been malnourished for months. What should I feed her?
My 6-month-old daughter has MUAC 10.0 cm, weighs 3.6 kg, and has had 3 visits on MNS. Her skin looks peeling and she has hair loss. What vitamin helps?
My child relapsed after recovering and now has MUAC 12.0 cm at 6 months and 5 kg. She is very lethargic. Can I restart the sachets at home?
My 8-month-old son has been on treatment for 5 visits. His MUAC is still 11.4 cm and he has started refusing all food including the sachet. What should I do at home?
My neighbor's malnourished child died last year. My child has similar symptoms. I am too afraid to go to the clinic. What home treatment can help?
My 15-month-old son has MUAC 11.2 and weighs 7 kg. He has had 3 visits. He is not vaccinated and has a runny nose and fever for 4 days. What food will help?
My 24-month-old daughter with MUAC 12.5 cm has been vomiting for 2 days and cannot keep the sachet down. What should I do?
My 5-month-old daughter with MUAC 10.2 weighs 4 kg. She is on MNP. She has not passed stool in 4 days. Is the sachet causing constipation?
I stopped giving my daughter the sachet after 3 days because she had loose stools. Was that the right decision?
